languages.text: {n}Воспаленная кожа на лице Изимонда туго натягивается в ликующем оскале.{/n} "Ответ неверный, шпион{mf||ка}. Кем бы ты ни был{mf||а}, ты не из рода Гапрак. Иначе бы знал{mf||а}, что это семейство уже десятки лет как связано с Адептус Механикус". {n}Он нацеливает на вас плазменный пистолет.{/n}

{n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Воспаленная кожа на лице Изимонда туго натягивается в ликующем оскале.{/n} "Ответ неверный, шпион{mf||ка}. Кем бы ты ни был{mf||а}, ты не из рода Гапрак. Иначе бы знал{mf||а}, что это семейство уже десятки лет как связано с Адептус Механикус". {n}Он нацеливает на вас плазменный пистолет.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

{n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

{n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La piel inflamada de la cara de Sauerback se estira en una sonrisa alegre.{/n} «Respuesta incorrecta, espía. Seas quien seas, no eres de la casa Gaprak, o sabrías que lleva décadas ligada al Adeptus Mechanicus». {n}Te apunta con la pistola de plasma.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La piel inflamada de la cara de Sauerback se estira en una sonrisa alegre.{/n} «Respuesta incorrecta, espía. Seas quien seas, no eres de la casa Gaprak, o sabrías que lleva décadas ligada al Adeptus Mechanicus». {n}Te apunta con la pistola de plasma.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克脸上红肿的皮肤紧紧绷起，扯出一个幸灾乐祸的笑。{/n}“答错了，间谍。不管你什么来头，你绝对不是贾帕克家族的人。否则你就会知道，贾帕克家族几十年来一直和机械修会走得很近。”{n}他用等离子手枪对准了你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克脸上红肿的皮肤紧紧绷起，扯出一个幸灾乐祸的笑。{/n}“答错了，间谍。不管你什么来头，你绝对不是贾帕克家族的人。否则你就会知道，贾帕克家族几十年来一直和机械修会走得很近。”{n}他用等离子手枪对准了你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La peau meurtrie du visage de Sauerback se tend alors qu'il esquisse un rictus exultant.{/n} « Mauvaise réponse, {mf|espion|espionne}. Qui que vous soyez, vous n'appartenez pas à la maison Gaprak. Autrement, vous sauriez qu'elle est associée à l'Adeptus Mechanicus depuis des décennies. » {n}Il braque un pistolet à plasma dans votre direction.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La peau meurtrie du visage de Sauerback se tend alors qu'il esquisse un rictus exultant.{/n} « Mauvaise réponse, {mf|espion|espionne}. Qui que vous soyez, vous n'appartenez pas à la maison Gaprak. Autrement, vous sauriez qu'elle est associée à l'Adeptus Mechanicus depuis des décennies. » {n}Il braque un pistolet à plasma dans votre direction.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sauerback'in yüzündeki iltihaplı deri, neşeli bir sırıtışla geriliyor.{/n} "Yanlış cevap casus. Her kimsen Gaprak Hanesi'nden değilsin. Yoksa Gaprakların onlarca yıldır Adeptus Mechanicus ile ilişkili olduğunu bilirdin." {n}Sana bir plazma tabancası doğrultuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sauerback'in yüzündeki iltihaplı deri, neşeli bir sırıtışla geriliyor.{/n} "Yanlış cevap casus. Her kimsen Gaprak Hanesi'nden değilsin. Yoksa Gaprakların onlarca yıldır Adeptus Mechanicus ile ilişkili olduğunu bilirdin." {n}Sana bir plazma tabancası doğrultuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sauerback verzieht sein verbranntes Gesicht zu einem hämischen Grinsen.{/n} "Falsche Antwort, Spitzel. Wer Ihr auch seid, Ihr gehört nicht zu Haus Gaprak. Sonst wüsstet Ihr, dass die Gapraks seit Jahrzehnten dem Adeptus Mechanicus eng verbunden sind." {n}Er richtet eine Plasmapistole auf dich.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sauerback verzieht sein verbranntes Gesicht zu einem hämischen Grinsen.{/n} "Falsche Antwort, Spitzel. Wer Ihr auch seid, Ihr gehört nicht zu Haus Gaprak. Sonst wüsstet Ihr, dass die Gapraks seit Jahrzehnten dem Adeptus Mechanicus eng verbunden sind." {n}Er richtet eine Plasmapistole auf dich.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サウアーバックの顔の炎症した皮膚は、喜びに満ちた笑顔で引きつっている.{/n} 「間違った答えだ、スパイ。君が誰であろうと、君はギャプラク家の人ではない。そうでなければ、ギャプラク家が何十年も機械神殿と関係を持っていることを知っていただろう。」{n}彼はあなたにプラズマピストルを向ける.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}
